description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image. Add a job called main (running in the default test stage) with a before_script that executes chmod 750 $(pwd), apt-get -qq update, apt-get -qq -y install curl python2.7 python-pip git jq, and pip install -r requirements.txt. In the script step run ./deploy.sh. Configure the job to always publish all untracked files as artifacts, set the artifacts to expire after 10 days, and have no special rules or deployment targets.
